name: Alpacaribou, Mystical Beast of the Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> アルパカリブ
name_jp_tl: Alpacaribou, Holy Beast of the Forest
desc:
● While in Attack Position: Attack Position Winged Beast, Insect, and Plant-Type monsters you control cannot be destroyed by battle.
● While in Defense Position: Defense Position Winged Beast, Insect, and Plant-Type monsters you control cannot be targeted by, or be destroyed by, card effects.
mnst_eff:
● While in Attack Position: Attack Position Winged Beast, Insect, and Plant-Type monsters you control cannot be destroyed by battle.
● While in Defense Position: Defense Position Winged Beast, Insect, and Plant-Type monsters you control cannot be targeted by, or be destroyed by, card effects.
eff:

mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects

attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
